title: onopordum illyricum subsp. euillyricum
intro: Onopordum illyricum subsp. euillyricum, also known as the Illyrian cottonthistle, is a subspecies of the thistle family, characterized by its prickly, thistle-like appearance and purple flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Onopordum illyricum subsp. euillyricum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
